result:
Everything is complete. The `pretty_clean/` and `pretty_clean_adapt.rs` files are untracked (new clean-room files, no commits per protocol); their content is confirmed live by the gate behavior (the previously-blocked witnesses now MATCH). All steps done: re-sync, three adapters, three routes adopted, frame declined, all gates green, report appended.

Pretty round-5 open-side integration COMPLETE.

RE-SYNC (step 1): Re-synced the five round-5 clean sources into crates/tamarin-theory/src/pretty_clean/ via the mechanical `crate::`->`super::` / `lib.rs`->`mod.rs` recipe: ast.rs (Restriction.expanded; TheoryItem Rule/Lemma carry solver inputs; new Heuristic/Verbatim), lemma.rs (restriction comment renders r.expanded), macros.rs (always-break vcat + render_predicates), theory.rs (render frame), mod.rs (new render_macros/render_predicates entry points). Reverse-transform byte-identity verified for all four changed crate::-carrying files plus mod.rs; doc.rs untouched (round-1 BSD exception); 0 clean files headered. Extended pretty_clean_adapt.rs with three value-only adapters: restriction_section(name, statement, expanded), macros_section + macro_conv, predicates_section. cargo build + cargo test --workspace --release green (0 failed; console_split_parity 59/0).

ROUTES (step 2), each gated on batch_echo_width(), each gated by JOBS=6 scripts/pretty_gate.sh — all EXACTLY 403 MATCH / 16 DIFF with 0 non-spore DIFFs, nothing reverted:
- (2a) RESTRICTION — ADOPTED byte-green. render_parsed_restriction batch path sort-resolves original+expanded and routes through restriction_section; the clean Restriction.expanded field closes the R3+4 single-formula blocker. Witness features/macros/MacroInLemmasAndRestrictions.spthy (statement A( m(m3(x)) ) vs comment A( x )) now MATCH; all 401 non-macro restrictions stayed green; clean formula::is_safety agrees with ported across the corpus.
- (2b) MACROS — ADOPTED byte-green. render_parsed_macros batch path routes through macros_section; the always-break vcat law closes the R3+4 sep-vs-vcat blocker. Same witness MATCH.
- (2c) PREDICATES — ADOPTED byte-green. The Predicates branch extracts formal params (always Term::Var), arity-1-folds + sort-resolves each body, routes through predicates_section -> clean render_predicates (margin-0 splice); defensive fallback to ported for any persistent/annotated/non-var head. Witnesses MATCH: dmn-basic.spthy, features/predicates/minimal.spthy, sapic timepoints.spthy.
- (2d) THEORY-FRAME — DECLINED (concrete reason, not a revert). Clean theory::render models the GATE-STRIPPED echo (parts.join + "\n\n\n\nend"): it omits the wf report, Generated-from stamp, configuration: line, tactics block, theory-level heuristic: pre-items block, and injective-fact-insts ppCache comment — all of which the real CLI must emit. Wiring it would drop CLI content and break wf_gate. Partial block-level routing is the accepted end state (task step 2d permits it); theory::render is re-synced for provenance with no call site.

FULL GATES (step 3) — all green on the final release binary:
- cargo build --release: 0 errors, 0 new warnings.
- cargo test --workspace --release: all suites pass, 0 failed; console_split_parity 59/0.
- pretty_gate (scripts/pretty_gate_r5_final.tsv, JOBS=6): 403 MATCH / 16 DIFF / 0 SKIP; the 16 are the unchanged features/auto-sources/spore/* closure gap (0 non-spore DIFFs).
- wf_gate (scripts/wf_gate_after_pretty_r5.tsv, JOBS=6): 419 MATCH / 0 DIFF, rows diff-identical to scripts/wf_gate_round7.tsv.
- web_parity (scripts/web_parity_r5.tsv, Tutorial seed): 158 MATCH / 0 DIFF (web panes stay ported — batch routes only).
- gen_license_headers.py --check: 0 stale, 133 headered.

HEADER DELTA (step 4): 0 (133 -> 133 GPL-headered .rs; no clean file headered — pretty_clean/* and pretty_clean_adapt.rs are headerless). NET-ZERO deletion holds: render_parsed_restriction (web message/source panes), render_parsed_macros (web_macros rules pane), and render_predicate (web source view) each keep a live non-batch caller via the batch_echo_width() fallback, so 0 dead functions and 0 LOC deleted. Deletion remains gated on a future web-layer clean-room.

Reverted: NONE — all three routes were byte-green on first try.

Report: appended a dated "pretty round-5" section to /home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/INTEGRATION_REPORT.md. Key files: /home/kamilner/tamarin-rs/crates/tamarin-theory/src/pretty_clean_adapt.rs (3 new adapters), /home/kamilner/tamarin-rs/crates/tamarin-theory/src/pretty_theory.rs (3 route gates), /home/kamilner/tamarin-rs/crates/tamarin-theory/src/pretty_clean/{ast,lemma,macros,theory,mod}.rs (re-synced). No git commits.
